name: Wrist MRI
description: MRI of the wrist for triangular fibrocartilage, carpal bones, and tendon evaluation

findings.technique: MRI of the wrist was performed with T1, T2, and fat-saturated sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: TFCC
sections.content: Triangular fibrocartilage complex [intact / no tear / no perforation].

sections.name: Carpal Bones
sections.content: Carpal bones [no fracture / no AVN / no bone marrow edema]. Scapholunate ligament [intact].

impression:
1. No TFCC tear.
2. No carpal instability.
3. Normal wrist MRI.
author: RadReport Templates
